content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Auto +1.83%, Pharma +1.30%, PSU Bank +1.44%, Bank Nifty +1.10%; VIX down 3.74% to 17.24 confirms risk-on tone. Global cues supportive (S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%). Portfolio is well-positioned with 12 holdings already capturing the rally; focus shifts to risk management on winners and avoiding cluster overload.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.66,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD intent — actually re-stating: position is +7.4%, SL already at 1040.66 (above entry, locking 5.7%). Per no-op rule, this would be wasted signal. Switching to HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +7.4%, SL already trailed to 1040.66 (entry 984, locks +5.8% gain). CMP 1058 with R1 at 1069.58. SL sits 1.6% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, EPS beat 14%). Let it run toward 1110 target. No SL change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor at -1.0%. SL 119 sits 3.9% below CMP 123.80, which is 4.7% below entry — already at calibrated risk budget. Gold cooling from peaks but VIX-down day has gold up 1.16%. Hold for portfolio diversification."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — same as stored. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position flat. SL 206 = -1.4% from entry 209. CMP 208.36 just above entry. Banking sector +0.96%, Q4 PAT +68% YoY thesis intact. Give it room — current SL only 1.1% below CMP, already tight. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4585.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, defence rally continues (+2.21% today). SL currently at entry 4575 — moving up to 4585 (just above entry) for a tiny lock-in. Wait — this is <0.5% change from stored SL. Per micro-adjust rule, skip. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.9%. SL 1420 (3.9% below entry, 1.1% below CMP 1440). Q4 results were strong (PAT +124% YoY, net-debt negative, dividend Rs 6). Stock spiked to 1577 intraday on May 5 then faded — typical post-result digestion. SL gives 1.1% buffer; maintain. Risk budget already in play."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.2%. SL already at 6950 (above entry 6900, locks small gain). CMP 7052, SL 1.4% below — within trail-gap. Q4 PAT +124% YoY, CDMO +61%. Let it run toward 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position flat (entered today). SL 820 (-2.1%). CMP 837 right at entry. Naval shipbuilding catalyst valid; Q4 results board meeting mid-late May (within 3 sessions possibly — binary watch). Hold; will tighten or exit on event proximity."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.2%. SL 358 = -3% from entry. CMP 366.25, SL 2.3% below — within budget. Q4 PAT +30% already printed. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%. CRITICAL: FY26 audited results call May 8 — that's 2 trading sessions away. Per binary-event rule, position must be event-managed. Position size: 25 × 1730 = ₹43,250 = 4.3% of portfolio — already ≤5%, so option (c) requirement met. SL 1675 = 3.2% below entry, 2.9% below CMP. Hold within the ≤5% sizing exception, do not add."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 805.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.1%. Q4 results delivered May 5 (PAT +18%, revenue +22%) — binary already passed. Tightening SL from 800 to 805 (0.6% move, just clears micro-adjust threshold). New SL 805 sits 1.6% below CMP 818.50 — within trail-gap discipline. R:R from CMP: (855-818.5)/(818.5-805) = 36.5/13.5 = 2.7x, fine."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4% with Auto sector leading (+1.83%). Q4 PAT +48% YoY, FY26 record results delivered. SL 3210 = -2.4% from entry. CMP 3301.70, SL 2.8% below — appropriate. Let the sector momentum run; target 3430."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending OPEN MIS BUY 600x @ 133.50 placed 356m ago — still sitting. Per order hygiene, do not stack. Letting it expire naturally as MIS will square off intraday. Not cancelling explicitly as price action could still revisit."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+7.4% with SL 1040.66 already locking 5.8% gain, 1.6% below CMP — within trail discipline. Let it run to 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor; SL at calibrated 119 (-4.7% from entry). Gold up 1.16% today; risk-on day but sector still bid. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+2.0%, SL 1715 already above entry 1700 locking +0.9%. CMP 1732.50, SL 1.0% below — exactly at trail-gap floor. Hold; tightening further risks self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat. SL 206 (1.1% below CMP) gives normal chop room. Banking +1.10% supportive. Hold to target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.8%, defence +2.21% today. SL at entry 4575 = 1.7% below CMP — already at trail-gap limit. Q4 results board May 14 — 6 sessions away, outside 3-session binary window for now. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-2.9%. Q4 results just printed strong; intraday digestion. SL 1420 gives 1.1% room below CMP. Hold; let thesis play out post-result."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+2.2%, SL 6950 already above entry, 1.4% below CMP — appropriate trail. Strong Q4 momentum. Hold to 7400."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat fresh entry. SL 820 = 2.0% below CMP. Q4 board meeting mid-late May — keep on watch; if a date is announced within 3 sessions will tighten or trim."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 already printed +30% PAT. SL 358 gives 2.3% room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FY26 results call May 8 (2 sessions). Position 4.3% of capital — meets binary-event ≤5% size exception (option c). SL 1675 = -3.2% from entry. Will not add; holding event-trade size through the call."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 805.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results passed (binary cleared). Trail SL from 800 → 805 to lock minor cushion below CMP 818.50 (1.6% gap)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.4% with Auto sector leading. Strong FY26 results. SL 3210 = 2.8% below CMP 3301.70 — appropriate. Let momentum run."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GRSE/TITAGARH/HAL form a defence-shipbuilding cluster — already long HAL+TITAGARH, GRSE adds correlated theme; per cluster-discipline, will not add a third defence name today. M&M held already; auto cluster in good shape — GABRIEL/SONACOMS skipped to avoid cluster stack. CAMS/COFORGE gap-ups not chased post-result without pullback. NEULANDLAB has board meeting May 12 — binary inside 3 sessions, NO_ACTION on new entry per binary-event rule. CHOLAHLDNG already held + binary May 8 means I'm full on financial services exposure. PSUBNKBEES already +33% FY26 — chase risk too high after the run.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 66% deployed across 12 names — diversified but with concentration in financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, ABCAPITAL, CHOLAHLDNG = ~21% of capital) and capital goods/defence (HAL, TITAGARH = ~10%). Deployed % below 80% soft target, which is acceptable on a day where most quality setups already gapped up (poor R:R for chasers). Cash buffer ₹345k = 34% gives flexibility for pullback entries. Win rate 15% over 5 days is poor — reading the data, the issue is too-tight trailing SLs on intraday volatility (per Day-10 lessons). Today's discipline: refusing to chase gap-ups, holding existing winners with appropriate trail gaps. CHOLAHLDNG May 8 binary is the only acknowledged event-tail in the book — sized at 4.3% which is within event-trade tolerance."
}
